lenses.name: Threat
lenses.description: Read the trailer as imminent danger.

lenses.name: Bond
lenses.description: Read the trailer as attachment and emotional pull.

lenses.name: Legend
lenses.description: Read the trailer as myth and world-scale fate.

queries.prompt: Find the moment where connection feels strongest.
Find the first shot that most strongly reads as direct threat.
Find the shot that turns the trailer into legend instead of incident.

moments.reading: the trailer opens with world-building scale instead of personal detail
the emotional center starts to surface in character framing
the strongest attachment beat lands here
uncertainty rises, but danger has not peaked yet
the footage reads as a direct and immediate threat event
scale expands from pursuit into something larger and mythic
this is the clearest myth-reading in the whole trailer
